recommendations.title: Alien Warfare
recommendations.overview: A team of Navy Seals investigates a mysterious science outpost only to have to combat a squad of powerful alien soldiers.

recommendations.title: Main Krishna Hoon
recommendations.overview: In answer to an orphan boy's prayers, the divine Lord Krishna comes to Earth, befriends the boy, and helps him find a loving family.

recommendations.title: South Park: Post COVID: The Return of COVID
recommendations.overview: If Stan, Kyle and Cartman could just work together, they could go back in time to make sure Covid never happened. But traveling back to the past seems to be the easy answer until they meet Victor Chaos.

recommendations.title: Mulan

recommendations.title: The Cathedral
recommendations.overview: Story of a pilgrim who comes to the Cathedral on the border of the known world. He wants to find answers. He finds tranquility.

recommendations.title: Iceman
recommendations.genres: Action, Adventure, Science Fiction, Comedy, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: An imperial guard and his three traitorous childhood friends ordered to hunt him down get accidentally buried and kept frozen in time. 400 years later, they are defrosted continuing the battle they left behind.

recommendations.title: Justice League: Secret Origins
recommendations.overview: When global catastrophe strikes, the World's Greatest Super Heroes answer the call to join Justice League. Justice League works together as a team to overcome a dangerous array of intersteller invaders and world conquering megalomaniacs.

recommendations.title: Unknown Number: The High School Catfish
recommendations.overview: Vulgar, taunting texts blow up the phones of a teen and her boyfriend. Who's sending them — and why? This twisty documentary reveals the shocking answer.
